TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 12 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This variable is new in 2024. The Inflation Reduction Act of 2022 caps the copay for a one-month 
supply of insulin on any tier to $35 beginning in 2024. If you get a two-month supply of insulin, your 
costs cannot be more than $35 for each month’s supply of each covered insulin product. This means
